bullets: • The choice of features significantly impacts learning algorithm performance.
• Feature engineering involves creating new features by transforming or combining original ones.
• Example: Using lot area (width * depth) instead of separate width and depth features for house price prediction.
• New features can improve model accuracy based on problem insights.
• Feature engineering can enable fitting non-linear functions to data.
